body.body: Every open Claude Code tab should be able to reach the Igor web UI (now HTTPS on port 8080). Current state: web server is up and serving HTTPS. Needs: verify igor_talk.py works with wss://, document the HTTPS URL for use in skills/scripts, confirm cc_send and WebSocket both work from all CC sessions. May need WSS support added to igor_talk.py (ssl=False for localhost).
body.title: All running CC instances connect to Igor web UI
body.result: igor_talk.py, cc_bridge.py, phrase_regression.py, cc_queue.py all updated to wss:// / https:// with ssl ctx. Smoke tested — WSS connection confirmed.
